name: Muscle Master Quest
description: Muscle Master Quest – Smash Running is an action-packed runner game where strength is your greatest weapon. Run through exciting obstacle courses, smash barriers, defeat enemies, and collect power-ups to grow stronger with every step. Time your moves carefully as each obstacle tests your muscle power and strategy. Upgrade your strength, unlock fun character skins, and face powerful boss challenges that push your limits. With fast-paced gameplay, satisfying smashing mechanics, and endless running action, Muscle Rush delivers a thrilling experience where only the strongest runners reach the finish line.
instructions: Tap mouse click and drag move
